description: Open-weights floor manifest for Invariant 17. The sentinel entry is a byte-stable structural stand-in proving the floor wiring; the ollama entry is the first real provider pin, held by a content-addressed provenance record rather than a model-content sha. Strengthening the provider pins to content-addressed model weights is tracked in KNOWN_WEAKNESSES.md § KW-FLOOR-001.

open_weights.notes: Content-addressed placeholder proving the floor wiring; not a real model.

First real open-weights floor pin. The sha256 content-addresses the operator's provenance record, NOT the model weights themselves. Runtime floor is held by OllamaGenerativeProvider(provider_id='ollama') against a local Ollama daemon; health() checks daemon reachability plus presence of XION_OLLAMA_FLOOR_MODEL in GET /api/tags. Strengthening to a content-addressed model-blob pin (per Invariant 17 clause 2(iii) large-file representative-sample sentinels) is tracked in KNOWN_WEAKNESSES.md § KW-FLOOR-001.
